rationale: Tests whether the rate of change of the equity put/call ratio crossing its moving average signals a structural sentiment flip.
expected_failure_mode: Retail options volume dynamics can distort the ratio as a proxy for institutional capital intent.
stop_conditions: simple family fails the named-window or parsimony gates
no new family leader improves Future Confidence and Trust
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
Win rate on long entries falls below 45% during choppy regimes.
Sharpe ratio on a 5-year rolling out-of-sample window drops below 0.4.
